exploration_notes: Created a new MetricsTracker in metrics_tracker.go using sync/atomic.Int64 for thread-safe counters (evaluations, matches, errors). Added it as a field on the Server struct in server.go and initialized it in the New() constructor. Integrated recording calls into the three public evaluation methods in evaluation.go: Variant (records evaluation + match on resp.Match + error), Boolean (records evaluation + match on MATCH_EVALUATION_REASON + error), and Batch (records per-item evaluation + match/err
